name: Yang2020 HQ
subject: A contribution shows that you’re willing to stand up and fight for what you believe in, and that you believe Andrew is the best Democrat to take the White House in 2020.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5203%2E377263%2Em8mc5Q) Yang Gang --

Right now, we’re falling behind pace to hit our FEC deadline goal. But, Yang Gang, we have a plan to get back on track.

[If everyone reading this who hasn’t made a contribution yet pitched in $8, we could close the gap and be right on pace to hit our goal. Can you pitch in $8 today?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20591?t=8&akid=5203%2E377263%2Em8mc5Q) | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20591?t=9&akid=5203%2E377263%2Em8mc5Q)
---
Your contribution in this moment is more than just hitting a goal or sending a big public message -- it’s a statement of values.

It shows that you’re willing to stand up and fight for what you believe in, and that you believe Andrew is the best Democrat to take on Trump and win the White House in 2020. Don’t forget that.

[Let’s do this, Yang Gang. Contribute now so we can get back on track and hit this goal by our end-of-quarter deadline. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20591?t=10&akid=5203%2E377263%2Em8mc5Q)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20591?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=5203%2E377263%2Em8mc5Q)

---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20591?t=6&amount=25&akid=5203%2E377263%2Em8mc5Q)
---
Yang2020 HQ
**Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast, and after that, our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Pitch in now so we can show everyone the power of this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20591?t=7&akid=5203%2E377263%2Em8mc5Q)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=5203%2E377263%2Em8mc5Q) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=5203%2E377263%2Em8mc5Q) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Tina Smith
subject: An explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We have our final FEC fundraising deadline next week, and I want to explain why this is such an important moment for our campaign.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191227-lme?refcode=em191227-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend --

In a few moments, I am going to ask you to make a donation to my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota. We have our final FEC fundraising deadline next week, and I want to explain why this is such an important moment for our campaign.

My first job in Minnesota was at General Mills. My husband Archie and I moved to St. Louis Park, had two children, and found our life here. After that, I started my own business and spent my time volunteering in our community. I loved it!

That work led me to Planned Parenthood, where I fought to champion women and families. I went on to become Chief of Staff for the Mayor of Minneapolis, and then Chief of Staff for Governor Mark Dayton.

When Mark asked me to run with him as Lieutenant Governor, I never looked back. I loved serving all Minnesotans, which eventually led me to the U.S. Senate -- where I have spent my first year standing up for what was right for our state and working hard to move good ideas forward.

The truth is, I didn't run for public office for fame, money, or power. I ran because I wanted to make a difference in people's lives. And folks like you supported me because you wanted to make a difference, too.

I want to keep fighting for the people of Minnesota and folks across the country, but I need your support to do so. So, here's the part where I ask for your help:

**Will you add a contribution of whatever you can afford to our re-election campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota before the end-of-year FEC deadline? I need your support to keep our team on track and focus on all the critical work we have ahead of us. Anything you can give would mean the world to me.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191227-lme?refcode=em191227-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---
| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191227-lme?refcode=em191227-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191227-lme?refcode=em191227-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191227-lme?refcode=em191227-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191227-lme?refcode=em191227-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191227-lme?refcode=em191227-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
Your support makes an incredible difference for our campaign and my work for the people of Minnesota. Every dollar you give allows me to continue fighting for our values in Washington -- and if we're successful next year, I'll get the chance to continue our important work.

I'm very fortunate to have supporters like you I can count on. I cannot tell you how grateful I am that you're a part of this. Thank you.

Yours,

Tina

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc40e33/c1f7015/6603e418/114482e0/1788335704/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: MichaelBennet.com
subject: hard decisions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |

| Team, here's the truth: [We need to raise another $526,522. If we fail to reach our goal, our campaign will be forced to make some hard decisions.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba884/134673f2/88d56eb/69979397/925658590/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_122719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Falling short means stretching our limited resources even further, cutting back on materials for our field organizers, and limiting how many voters our paid media program can reach.

[Making these hard decisions means that the billionaires will continue to drown us out. So we're pouring all our energy into reaching our $700,000 goal and thinking about what we CAN do when we reach it.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba884/134673f2/88d56eb/69979397/925658590/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_122719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Warren HQ
subject: Free sticker for you: tax the ultra-rich
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
A small group of the wealthiest families has gobbled up a massive amount of wealth American workers have produced, and the middle class has been hollowed out because of it... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bef5/45c30650/1144c0d17/66fab363/1810255816/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
**[We have an important end-of-quarter goal to hit this week.
Chip in any amount today to help hit our goal and receive your free "tax the ultra-rich" sticker >>](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bef5/45c30650/1144c0d17/66fab362/1810255816/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnItc3RpY2tlci11bXQiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTFMRl9FT1FfU1RLX1FfMjAxOTEyMjdfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr-sticker-umt?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM1LF_EOQ_STK_Q_20191227_V1S2_P")**
**The problem:** Right now, our economy works for the rich and powerful. A small group of the wealthiest families has gobbled up a massive amount of wealth American workers have produced, and the middle class has been hollowed out because of it.

**The solution:** Elizabeth's Ultra-Millionaire Tax will tax the wealth of the richest Americans (who have $50 million or more) so we can rebuild the middle class and invest in an America that works for all of us. It'll help fund universal child care, a high-quality public education for every kid in America, universal free college, student debt cancellation, and more.

**It's time for the ultra-wealthy to pay their fair share and pitch in so everyone has a chance, wouldn't you agree?**

**[We're counting on grassroots donors to help hit our end-of-quarter goal so our campaign can keep fighting to make this plan a reality. So when you chip in any amount today, we'll send you a free "tax the ultra-rich" sticker to say thanks >>](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bef5/45c30650/1144c0d17/66fab362/1810255816/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnItc3RpY2tlci11bXQiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTFMRl9FT1FfU1RLX1FfMjAxOTEyMjdfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr-sticker-umt?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM1LF_EOQ_STK_Q_20191227_V1S2_P")**

clean_body: A small group of the wealthiest families has gobbled up a massive amount of wealth American workers have produced, and the middle class has been hollowed out because of it... | | | "" "" The problem: Right now, our economy works for the rich and powerful. A small group of the wealthiest families has gobbled up a massive amount of wealth American workers have produced, and the middle class has been hollowed out because of it. The solution: Elizabeth's Ultra-Millionaire Tax will tax the wealth of the richest Americans (who have $50 million or more) so we can rebuild the middle class and invest in an America that works for all of us. It'll help fund universal child care, a high-quality public education for every kid in America, universal free college, student debt cancellation, and more. It's time for the ultra-wealthy to pay their fair share and pitch in so everyone has a chance, wouldn't you agree? disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR CONGRESS**
body:

[](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhldodk-uuffjdtr-i/)
| | | Friend, Thank you for opening up this email — I know you’re busy, and I know the holiday season is still upon us and you have MANY other things to do. I promise this won’t take long, and that it’s important. Our campaign is going great and gaining supporters and momentum all the time. But we have a big deadline coming up on December 31. This TUESDAY marks the end of the last fundraising period of this year. _**ALL EYES will be on us, and whether or not we reach our goal!**_ I hope I can count on your help. Our campaign is gaining supporters, fulfilling orders for stickers and yard signs all over the district, and I am getting out and about, meeting as many people as I can. So, this is the goal we want to hit:
---
---
[](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhldodk-uuffjdtr-d/)
Your support is critical in this final stretch. Can I count on you to pitch in? [_**< < YES, NANCY. I WILL PITCH IN NOW! >>
<< SECURE ONLINE DONATION. CLICK HERE >>**_](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhldodk-uuffjdtr-h/) Your support means the world to me. This time is a critical one for our campaign. We want to send a clear signal that the first district is hungry for new, responsive leadership in Congress. It’s time to restore the spirit of service -- true representation for the Lowcountry -- [_**Make A Donation To Nancy’s Campaign Here >>**_
_**Make A Donation To Nancy’s Campaign Here >>**_
_**Make A Donation To Nancy’s Campaign Here >>**_](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhldodk-uuffjdtr-k/) Thank you, and from my family to yours, I hope you are enjoying your holidays! Sincerely, Nancy Mace

| | | Peter, Coach is coming under attack... and it's not just from the Democrats desperate to prop up liberal Doug Jones.

_**The failed career politician Republicans CAN 'T STAND that Coach is calling them out!**_

This is what we're up against. We can't have ANY of these people representing the good people of Alabama in the U.S. Senate. That's why we're set to launch the most aggressive grassroots conservative ground campaign our state has ever seen. But as of this morning, we're still $42,586 away from our goal.

_**[Rush a contribution right now to help TAKE BACK Alabama!](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=fb7c20aab534b2c6b52e9bb0467502cb717a9da7abfe1374ce5a2c8db6faa567337260f46a6a24be45df1148394e1cf1e7881d337f65678f "Rush a contribution right now to help TAKE BACK Alabama!") **_

Doug Jones has raised well over $5.6 MILLION this year, and the leftist elites are preparing to pour in many millions more. They know that Doug Jones is out-of-touch with Alabama voters... and they're hoping that they can BUY this seat again on November 3rd!

This is our chance to send a no-nonsense conservative outsider to the U.S. Senate, to stand with President Trump. We cannot afford to fall short.

[_**If you have Coach 's back, please respond today**_.](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=fb7c20aab534b2c65c9110df11213a2d0b71f980fc6a06e4411ab6d7eb4ba884ffd52e805ad09c6a139304897c11f72cebc72c26829b89b2 "If you have Coach’s back, please respond today.") subject: Circus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
---
| | Peter, **Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer have turned Washington into a three-ring circus.** First, they ran a rigged impeachment process, then they refused to turn over the articles of impeachment to the Senate so we can fulfill our Constitutional duties. [](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhljqky-kujulhlke-y/) It’s ridiculous, but not surprising. With 76% of Americans believing that the economy is booming, the Democrats must do everything possible to keep impeachment in the news to stand a chance at winning in 2020. **That’s all they care about – winning the next election.** And they are willing to destroy President Trump, our economy, and our country to get the jobs done. We can’t let them win. We must stand united behind President Trump and defend him from these baseless attacks. **[Please join me in defending our President by making a donation of $100, $50, or $25 today.](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhljqky-kujulhlke-j/)** Every dollar you can send today will be used to back President Trump in 2020 and to defeat the radical leftist agenda. It is more important than ever before to unite behind President Trump. Our economic gains and conservative values are at risk. Help us send a loud and clear message that we will not back down to the Democrats partisan games by making an important donation today. Thanks, Team Braun [](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhljqky-kujulhlke-t/) |

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: A lot happened this month, and there are still 3 days left!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/plJn6S8FMYdOwqZTYBLP2QPjdJ1VPSdsrxhhve3UXbM=/Tv73pkuyG7s36ypDk1JRWDrYOA80qUBxLOaiC22EQ8k=?recurring=auto&amount=22&refcode=20191228email)
---
Hi there, My team wanted me to send you a quick email asking for end-of-quarter contributions...so, to be clear, this is a fundraising email ([and if you want to skip right to chipping in, click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/plJn6S8FMYdOwqZTYBLP2QPjdJ1VPSdsrxhhve3UXbM=/Tv73pkuyG7s36ypDk1JRWDrYOA80qUBxLOaiC22EQ8k=?recurring=auto&amount=22&refcode=20191228email)), but I really want to talk to you about all the incredible momentum our movement has had just these last few months.**We 've been traveling across the district, speaking with voters, and catching national attention too! Here are our highlights:**
* We hosted 15 house parties across the district
* We opened our new campaign office
* We garnered an incredible list of endorsements from...
* End Citizens United
* Blue Dog Coalition
* Council for a Livable World
* 30+ Members of Congress
* 4 State Reps
* 2 County Elected Officials
* 1 Local Mayor
* 3 Local Council Members
* 15 Local Candidates and Electeds
* 8 Ambassadors
* We helped local candidates for city council in the November elections -- local elections matter and I thank you for voting!
* We saw the Trump administration undermine and attack Foreign Service Officers as well as uniformed military -- proving how desperately we need more true public servants, especially Foreign Service Officers, in Washington.
* We witnesses Republicans getting so afraid of us winning this seat that they recruited a member of the Bush family to run against me, _even though he lives in a different district_.

And now, it's all about to come to a close -- the month, the year, and the decade! Most importantly though, it's the end of the quarter, which means that our fundraising reports are going public at midnight on December 31st. **That means all eyes will be on our report to see how strong this campaign is and how much people care about the things we are fighting for: healthcare, education, the environment, and reducing gun violence.** [**So, I 'm personally asking, friend, will you chip in now to help us reach our fundraising goal this quarter?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/plJn6S8FMYdOwqZTYBLP2QPjdJ1VPSdsrxhhve3UXbM=/Tv73pkuyG7s36ypDk1JRWDrYOA80qUBxLOaiC22EQ8k=?recurring=auto&amount=22&refcode=20191228email) | | **[DONATE NOW ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/plJn6S8FMYdOwqZTYBLP2QPjdJ1VPSdsrxhhve3UXbM=/Tv73pkuyG7s36ypDk1JRWDrYOA80qUBxLOaiC22EQ8k=?recurring=auto&amount=22&refcode=20191228email)**
---
**Right now, the stakes of this race could not be higher and I thank you for standing with me.** Your support empowers me, and the whole campaign team, to work around the clock fighting back and organizing for Texas.
**But that means, if we 're going to keep this momentum up in the new year, I need your help. As the race for TX-22 continues to ramp up, it's more important than ever that we hit our fundraising goal this quarter before our reports go public _in just 3 days!_**
[**So please, chip in to help us reach this critical fundraising goal NOW before time runs out! ⇨**](https://act.myngp.com/el/plJn6S8FMYdOwqZTYBLP2QPjdJ1VPSdsrxhhve3UXbM=/Tv73pkuyG7s36ypDk1JRWDrYOA80qUBxLOaiC22EQ8k=?recurring=auto&amount=22&refcode=20191228email)

body:

Friend,

The Fake News media, and their partner, the Democrats, are working overtime to make life for the Republican Party, including YOUR President, as difficult as possible.

It's obvious that 2020 Big Government Socialists know they can't win the Election, so they've started commissioning help from Nervous Nancy, Adam Shifty Schiff, and Jerry to try and BRING US DOWN.

Peter, As I wake up each day to run for Congress, it’s not just winning the election that gets me going. Because I know that one vote, one office, one two-year term will not be enough to address the real problems so many of us are facing. We need a movement to achieve real political change. So my commitment has been: this campaign must do good things along the way. We must show the people of this district that Democrats will fight for them year-round, in election years and off years, not just when we need their votes, but when they need our support. I quit my job on February 1, 2019, to run for Congress full-time. Here’s some of what our team has accomplished since then. **Removing a vote-suppressing Secretary of State.** At the start of 2019, we learned that David Whitley, acting Texas Secretary of State, tried to purge 95,000 voters from the rolls. The people targeted were new Mexican-American citizens. So when Whitley’s confirmation was up for a vote, we took action. I organized supporters from across the district, including Austin County, a rural area where Hispanic voters received a threatening letter from their county clerk, suggesting they would go to jail if they voted. We turned out to the Texas capitol, testified to the confirmation committee, and helped convince the Texas Senate to reject Whitley!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13327353/138275722/203122784?refcode=em122819&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjExNWRlOS05MTI5LWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWEfNNF_m6zL2n2riJLlFwbEJz1-AOm76fSTd7yLSEs=)
**Fighting to keep a rural hospital open.** One of the biggest challenges in TX-10 is healthcare, and because Republicans refused Medicaid expansion, rural hospitals have been closing. The latest at-risk facility is St. Mark’s in La Grange. When local Democrats sought to keep the hospital open by having the county take over the hospital, we organized cars of volunteers to knock doors in La Grange to support the effort.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13327354/138275723/203122784?refcode=em122819&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjExNWRlOS05MTI5LWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWEfNNF_m6zL2n2riJLlFwbEJz1-AOm76fSTd7yLSEs=) **
**Electing a Democrat to Bastrop City Council.** Dock Jackson is an African-American community leader in Bastrop, who in June took on a Republican incumbent for city council. When he put out the call for support, we answered, bringing staff and volunteers to get out the vote. We knocked on hundreds of doors for Dock, and he won by 33 votes on Election Day! Bastrop County is a swing county in TX-10, and this victory shows what is possible in 2020.
** ** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13327355/138275724/203122784?refcode=em122819&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjExNWRlOS05MTI5LWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWEfNNF_m6zL2n2riJLlFwbEJz1-AOm76fSTd7yLSEs=)**
**Fighting to close the Fayette Coal Plant.** In the middle of TX-10 is a toxic power plant that is polluting the air and water for an entire region. My commitment has been to use our organizing network to unite local community members with Austin environmentalists. As a representative, I will help finish the job of closing Fayette Coal, organizing an environmental clean-up, and creating new jobs building sustainable industry.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13327356/138275725/203122784?refcode=em122819&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjExNWRlOS05MTI5LWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWEfNNF_m6zL2n2riJLlFwbEJz1-AOm76fSTd7yLSEs=)**
**Stopping the execution of Rodney Reed.** Rodney Reed is a black man on Texas Death Row, who was arrested and convicted in a terribly flawed prosecution decades ago. His case is a relic of Jim Crow times: a white suspect who was never investigated; DNA evidence never tested; a biased prosecutor and jury. I wrote a clemency letter, spoke at major rallies, and joined an international movement for justice. Rodney’s execution was delayed, luckily, and we continue to fight for his life. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13327357/138275726/203122784?refcode=em122819&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjExNWRlOS05MTI5LWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWEfNNF_m6zL2n2riJLlFwbEJz1-AOm76fSTd7yLSEs=)**
**Organizing the first Texas Town Hall on the Green New Deal.** The Texas 10th is a district that brings together environmentalists, a coal plant, and Houston oil and gas workers. This is where the conversation about climate change must happen. In Houston we’ve had five “500 year floods” in five years. The Fayette Coal Plant has polluted an aquifer that dozens of counties rely upon. We cannot wait to take action on climate change. In September, we brought together local and national leaders from youth, labor, and environmental movements, to talk about why we need a Green New Deal here in Texas.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13327358/138275727/203122784?refcode=em122819&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjExNWRlOS05MTI5LWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWEfNNF_m6zL2n2riJLlFwbEJz1-AOm76fSTd7yLSEs=)**
**Suing the State to stop voter suppression.** Texas Republicans know the only way they keep power is by cheating, so in 2019 they passed a ban on some early voting locations. In response, I’ve joined with the Texas Young Democrats, Texas College Democrats, and 96 year-old Terrell Blodgett to sue the State to stop this vote suppression tactic.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13327359/138275728/203122784?refcode=em122819&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjExNWRlOS05MTI5LWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWEfNNF_m6zL2n2riJLlFwbEJz1-AOm76fSTd7yLSEs=)******
You can see we’ve been busy. And now, with the March 3 Texas primary coming up, we are harnessing this movement to take the Texas 10th. Please continue to chip in, so we can not only win this seat, but so we can show what real Democratic representation looks like. **In solidarity,
Mike Siegel**** ** ****

Peter,
In 2018, Dan Crenshaw raised **$2.7 million**. In order to compete with that we are going to have to do some heavy lifting.
[**Since we are not taking a dime from corporate PACs, it’s not going to be easy to go up against Crenshaw. Chip in $25 or whatever you can today >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13328264/138279123/1785235803?refcode=1228_eoq_4&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWIzYWY3Yi05MzI5LWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VJMAn6uLkGzX8hrsyvOk-zGlRyqP1SNkceTiYqKL6Ro=)
**I have never been afraid of a challenge.** When I was 17 years old I swore an oath to protect and defend the Constitution when I joined ROTC. When I became a public school teacher I fought day in and day out for low-income students who were being left behind by a system that cared more about standardized test scores than critical thinking.
Now I am stepping up to a new type of challenge - defeating an extremist with the backing of corporate PACs and dark money that are willing to give him thousands of dollars in just one donation.

clean_body: = Peter, In 2018, Dan Crenshaw raised $2.7 million. In order to compete with that we are going to have to do some heavy lifting. = I have never been afraid of a challenge. When I was 17 years old I swore an oath to protect and defend the Constitution when I joined ROTC. When I became a public school teacher I fought day in and day out for low-income students who were being left behind by a system that cared more about standardized test scores than critical thinking. Now I am stepping up to a new type of challenge - defeating an extremist with the backing of corporate PACs and dark money that are willing to give him thousands of dollars in just one donation. = | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** We only have a few more days until the end of the quarter - and when those numbers come out all eyes will be on our fundraising numbers. name: Charles Booker
subject: The people behind this movement
body:
|
---
Folks, When I set out on my listening tour across the Commonwealth, I had no idea what to expect. What I knew for sure was how important it is for regular folks to be listened to for a change. People need to know that their voices belong in the rooms where decisions are made. The folks my team and I met during the weeks we were on the road made it clearer than ever: **Kentucky is ready for a movement to defeat Mitch McConnell and take our future back.** I learned this from **Serena** , who moved to Covington from another part of the Commonwealth to make sure her family had cleaner air to breathe and water to drink. From **Venus** , who loves living in the mountains of Whitesburg and is fighting to afford to stay. From **Chastity** in Bowling Green, who wants the bright future for her baby son, Jonah, that we all dream of for our children. **I won’t stop fighting for each and every one of these folks.** I won’t stop fighting until everybody, no matter how much money they have in their pocket, has access to quality health care. Until everyone earns a dignified living wage and nobody is working just to survive. Until clean air and water are guaranteed for all. This isn’t the radical thing to do. **It’s the right thing to do.** The only thing in our way is knowing for sure that we have the resources to take on Mitch McConnell. We have _**three days**_ left before my team and I close the fundraising books and start to make a decision on whether I’ll officially run for Senate. **_****_**[We’re several thousand dollars behind where we need to be by Dec. 31. But this movement has shown me before that small dollars can move mountains. If you’re ready for a movement that puts people first, join me today and chip in $10 or more.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13331572/138307853/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191228-nd_a1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTVlNTM2NC05ZTI5LWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PRz-DGHe8ho5Ceam-ykFmSJ0Kt7cB0ODh4EZZZYPqWI=)**_****_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **** | ******[Express Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13331573/138307854/-1631903886?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=cbec20191228-AB-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTVlNTM2NC05ZTI5LWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PRz-DGHe8ho5Ceam-ykFmSJ0Kt7cB0ODh4EZZZYPqWI=)******

clean_body: | Folks, When I set out on my listening tour across the Commonwealth, I had no idea what to expect. What I knew for sure was how important it is for regular folks to be listened to for a change. People need to know that their voices belong in the rooms where decisions are made. The folks my team and I met during the weeks we were on the road made it clearer than ever: Kentucky is ready for a movement to defeat Mitch McConnell and take our future back. I learned this from Serena , who moved to Covington from another part of the Commonwealth to make sure her family had cleaner air to breathe and water to drink. From Venus , who loves living in the mountains of Whitesburg and is fighting to afford to stay. From Chastity in Bowling Green, who wants the bright future for her baby son, Jonah, that we all dream of for our children. I won’t stop fighting for each and every one of these folks. I won’t stop fighting until everybody, no matter how much money they have in their pocket, has access to quality health care. Until everyone earns a dignified living wage and nobody is working just to survive. Until clean air and water are guaranteed for all. This isn’t the radical thing to do. It’s the right thing to do. The only thing in our way is knowing for sure that we have the resources to take on Mitch McConnell. We have three days left before my team and I close the fundraising books and start to make a decision on whether I’ll officially run for Senate. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | ** | **=** ** ** ****** | ****=** ** ** ****** | ****=** ** ** ****** | ****=** I’ll never stop putting you first. Thank you, Charles Booker **=** **= ** Contributions to CBEC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. While Mitch McConnell gets richer, our state gets poorer. As he gains power in Washington, our communities lose it in Kentucky. That’s why Charles Booker is seriously considering running for the U.S. Senate. But he wants to do this right. As he keeps traveling the state to have real conversations with real people, =** Charles Booker Exploratory Committee PO BOX 11081 Louisville, KY 40251 United States

clean_body: I know this may sounds like an odd request. | = = | = = I'm so incredibly proud and humbled by that powerfully important number, Peter. It proves we're running this campaign the right way. Listen, I know what $13 can mean to a working family. It could be a child's lunch money for a week. It could be a pizza for dinner for your family. It could be a few gallons of gas to get to work. Please know that I don't take asking you for your hard-earned money lightly. I was a working single mom to my only daughter, Kathryn. I know how important every cent is. = = = = Thank you for your time on this Saturday! Best, = Kim Mangone Democratic Candidate for Congress, CA-23 P.S. Our end-of-year fundraising deadline is just 3 days away, so what you do now will truly make a difference.= = | Paid for by Kim Mangone For Congress PO Box 3293, Quartz Hill, CA 93586 Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. But time is running out to hit our end-of-year fundraising goal by midnight Tuesday. This is our last fundraising deadline before the 2020 election year, and we'll have to report publicly whether we hit our goal or fell short.

Derek, will you take a look at Mark Warner's 2019 wish list and see if there's any way you can help us hit this final fundraising goal?
**Mark Warner's 2019 Wish List**

**[$100 to pay a campaign office phone bill](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d6e3/53d9897e/53baf73e/1c89cb9a/2038850306/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQwNSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-holidaylist?refcode=20191228_f_1_nd__405__&refcode2=ask4&amount=100")**

name: Tiffani Sykhammountry, Team Kennedy
subject: some numbers as we close out 2019:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390cc0/55b66746/2dc09a91/80f4da4/840967693/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Hi I'm a numbers person. I love a good statistic. And I just so happen to be on the finance team here at Team Kennedy. So, when Joe asked me to give you a December wrap up, it made sense to share my favorite number from the month: **29,143 new people joined Team Kennedy this month alone.** When we talk about "a campaign that brings folks in, and that's powered by _people_ , not corporate PACs," we're not just sharing our values, we're acting on them. **But now, I'll be blunt. Before we close out the year, we want to make sure we sustain and show our progress.** **[We've set our December goal of 2,020 grassroots donations. Will you be part of our grassroots coalition? Contribute $3 now to get us there!](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390cc0/55b66746/2dc09a91/80f4da5/840967693/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-28-tiffani-nd&recurring=1&amount=3")** We've been putting every dollar toward building our movement: hiring staff, activating the best volunteers in the world, welcoming folks from all over Massachusetts, and making sure our message gets out loud and clear. In January, we have a lot planned, and can't wait to tell you all about it. But we want to be prepared as we enter 2020 for the fight ahead. We need to make sure we have the resources to ensure _everyone's_ voice is heard. So will you help fuel our campaign in 2020? **[Can you give $3 so we can reach our goal of 2,020 donations before the New Year?](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390cc0/55b66746/2dc09a91/80f4da5/840967693/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-28-tiffani-nd&recurring=1&amount=3")** [Donate](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390cc0/55b66746/2dc09a91/80f4da5/840967693/VEsC/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-28-tiffani-nd&recurring=1&amount=3") Let's build this movement and _win_. _Tiffani_ Tiffani Sykhammountry National Finance Manager [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390cc0/55b66746/2dc09a91/80f4da5/840967693/VEsD/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-28-tiffani-nd&recurring=1&amount=3") |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts.
---|---
| This email was sent by **[Joe Kennedy](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390cc0/55b66746/2dc09a91/80f4da6/840967693/VEsA/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/")**.
PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

Email is an important way for Joe Kennedy to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? [**Switch to our less email option here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390cc0/55b66746/2dc09a91/80f4da7/840967693/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/s/less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you no longer want to hear from Joe Kennedy, [click here to get off all our lists instantly.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390cc0/55b66746/2dc09a91/80f4da0/840967693/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? name: DEMOCRATIC NEWS ALERT (via MaggieHassan.com)
subject: BREAKING: Lewandowski's potential Senate run
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc37e/2a380d31/22d2fa7b/f0ff6b/4130064742/VEsH/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc37e/2a380d31/22d2fa7b/f0ff6b/4130064742/VEsE/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
We just got some terrible news:
**Cory Lewandowski is saying that if he were to decide today, he 'd run for Senate in New Hampshire against Democrat Jeanne Shaheen.**
If Jeanne loses, Democrats have zero chance of winning back the Senate and protecting the future of the Supreme Court. And since Lewandowski is one of Trump's closest allies, the stakes are extremely high.
Jeanne's campaign needs all hands on deck, so we said we'd help her campaign bring in 1,000 donations TODAY. clean_body: "" "" We just got some terrible news: Cory Lewandowski is saying that if he were to decide today, he 'd run for Senate in New Hampshire against Democrat Jeanne Shaheen. If Jeanne loses, Democrats have zero chance of winning back the Senate and protecting the future of the Supreme Court. And since Lewandowski is one of Trump's closest allies, the stakes are extremely high. Jeanne's campaign needs all hands on deck, so we said we'd help her campaign bring in 1,000 donations TODAY. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Jeanne Shaheen and Maggie Hassan. "" "" "" "" Look, there is video of Lewandowski assaulting a reporter, and he's been accused of sexual harassment. Make no mistake: Corey Lewandowski is unfit for office. If you don 't get involved, Lewandowski has a very real shot at unseating Jeanne. "" Thanks for helping, Team Maggie ""

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Good news ... Bad news:
body:
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e0f/4bef7a87/6a349907/287f9593/2169123882/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**GOOD NEWS:** Our end of quarter fundraising drive is off to a tremendous start. We have received an impressive number of individual contributions and we are on a path toward reporting a number we can all be very proud of.
**BAD NEWS:** All the evidence suggests that Susan Collins is raising huge sums of money from big-money donors. First, Mitch McConnell promised she'd be "well funded" after the Kavanaugh vote, and then, of course, one of Kavanaugh's biggest backers held a huge fundraiser for her in his $4 million home. Not great.
So our job between now and this FEC fundraising deadline is to generate as many individual donations as we possibly can to help us close the gap between us and Susan Collins.
Because if we can do that, we are going to win. So we're asking:
**[Can you make a $3 contribution to our campaign before our critical FEC fundraising deadline comes to an end? Your help is our best chance to fight back against the big money supporting Susan Collins.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e0f/4bef7a87/6a349907/287f9592/2169123882/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191228-1-full")**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:

---|---
[Donate $50](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e0f/4bef7a87/6a349907/287f9596/2169123882/VEsHAg/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em191228-1-full") | [Donate $100](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e0f/4bef7a87/6a349907/287f9595/2169123882/VEsHDQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em191228-1-full")
---|---
[Donate $250](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e0f/4bef7a87/6a349907/287f9594/2169123882/VEsHDA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em191228-1-full") | [Other amount](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e0f/4bef7a87/6a349907/287f9590/2169123882/VEsEBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?express_lane=true&refcode=em191228-1-full")

Thank you,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager

Friend,

We wrote to you earlier this month about how crucial our End-of-Year Fundraising Campaign is to jumpstart 2020.

Hoosiers across our great state responded with overwhelming enthusiasm and we couldn’t be more grateful for their support.

But we still have work to do if we want to keep Putting People First and delivering for all Hoosiers in 2020 and beyond.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=1e10c73dec884f3d94f0ab98f78941eb&_e=fd20d1n4d7hb13EA0_Q7W7T3q5sph9YW-mT9KhPv2nruZcuySlR4LShO-SapeZNHj0SM_Ev6WIjLE7gVMQDnU2w5JOIG9toKW-0LKFzlIILHEV8bC7qeK1pqAGODO2yQ4XslPaWbEN_jUmDfHA3eFG_Vk0rZXP8EiqA01w5JX8i3ETPK2lDKYFNp1zKreJFSK9tbwwEeb0m_LeOk3BtBHZuo8uHMRy4kLegQaTc8ATFGhmARABPTfdyZy7niIOzcbMOHH3d0awcHVH17Rc5BvPk9cWkauKNC5PWvvo9fIsc5J67Af9-HaYlM6jJEiqAP3xiQ895ohYfBGQkfXOllworez-lGo-_BQNDj1fKOeEAxtFhyrO8SMLIIzv2TV6G0GnVgEwLxDC8N0HkJHsxiM7HWJBmEUxpUhF9X2jPSMOU%3D)
[ **Contribute to our 2019 End-of-Year Fund** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=1e10c73dec884f3d94f0ab98f78941eb&_e=fd20d1n4d7hb13EA0_Q7W7T3q5sph9YW-mT9KhPv2nruZcuySlR4LShO-SapeZNHj0SM_Ev6WIjLE7gVMQDnU2w5JOIG9toKW-0LKFzlIILHEV8bC7qeK1pqAGODO2yQ4XslPaWbEN_jUmDfHA3eFG_Vk0rZXP8EiqA01w5JX8i3ETPK2lDKYFNp1zKreJFSipJfDYBzc2YWBxJEnU8UHJY0pTlOVNEHmtXWmnoYdZyiaKSZc_iSB2YP-UVbbR_2MNo574BLkTJiwIQbV1U9cbFlh9IxMnLTKgTfkKA5xNk_RjzGocQgdQg7boJHQVYkYzcH4b2Miz_i3AMyScgBlGh4bmbA9dUVbQS2XdiAItg-AJu9s6ynzkrLEHbbJKX66YyaTCiNSVDhUcVqQ0I04zM07vBuW1Gzfdeldsw2i9I%3D)
_We’re going to need our grassroots community in all 92 of Indiana’s counties to be all in._

**That means we can’t wait until after New Year’s Eve. We can’t wait until 2020. And we definitely can’t wait until it’s time to vote. **

**We need to get started right NOW and we need you to step up. **

Will you make a difference for us before 2020?
[ **Make a difference before 2020** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=1e10c73dec884f3d94f0ab98f78941eb&_e=fd20d1n4d7hb13EA0_Q7W7T3q5sph9YW-mT9KhPv2nruZcuySlR4LShO-SapeZNHj0SM_Ev6WIjLE7gVMQDnU2w5JOIG9toKW-0LKFzlIILHEV8bC7qeK1pqAGODO2yQ4XslPaWbEN_jUmDfHA3eFG_Vk0rZXP8EiqA01w5JX8i3ETPK2lDKYFNp1zKreJFSzNlBaPBqglLPY7RIhr4HoWSjY5K3AaMp71TWEWG-zPyHjJv_4GRPdPblXJomFMVQK3UuL5EmGBclBC89CWRZc17cIsMx3peAof7MzY-8rJlbFES2UUO7t4xtljcBj3r910-m8dhHB-14vHQ7oWyFWcOzUhYmbI5l8Zr0k6xD3GeE-w0uG4lcOnNNJcC6JyQTozCm3LGrk82snH-mY-DEUoVP0UpsDU3ELQH0Wr3eE2Y%3D)

Holcomb Crew

subject: no regrets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:

| I'm so grateful for you, team.

Even when the DNC blocked us from the debates, or when some of the pundits doubted us, or when we announced our most aggressive fundraising goal yet, you've stood strong.

Yesterday, we launched our first TV ad in New Hampshire. Now my team says we need at least 10 people from 18326 to donate today to stay on track to hit our goal tomorrow and keep our ads on TV.

[So can I count on you to make your first donation?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba880/134673f2/88027bf/699794fc/1223957242/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Coming from a politically diverse state like Colorado, I've never known an easy election. I knew running for president would be no different. But restoring decency to our highest office is worth the fight.

We can't let this election just become bickering over empty promises and policies we can't pass. We have to ignite our base while also winning back the places we lost in 2016. We've got to make sure everyone knows they have a president who's more concerned about their kids' future than the next tweet.

That's why I'm running. I'm the only candidate who's won two elections in a purple swing state, and I know how to bring people together to make sustainable progress.

But I can't do it alone. I need your help to keep fighting and make sure everyone sees our TV ad.

[So can you chip in $5 to my campaign for president? Every dollar we raise will get us closer to reaching our crucial $700,000 fundraising goal to invest in New Hampshire:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba880/134673f2/88027bf/699794fc/1223957242/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Walter Mondale
subject: We can’t miss this opportunity
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| My friend, We're living in a deeply troubling moment in history. The President of the United States is spreading division, fear, and chaos from the highest levels of our government, and the Republican Party is enabling him every step of the way. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/kuAEDMNhu1LLdfilzivDDcPjo-0eZ4aaKEVJmYi36kE=/jEGcQ_xnGvIhYV_hgpRxDOkNaFSX1l9xITWtTkEec-Y=?refcode=header&amount=25)
---
My friend,
We're living in a deeply troubling moment in history.
The President of the United States is spreading division, fear, and chaos from the highest levels of our government, and the Republican Party is enabling him every step of the way.
It's times like these that I'm most thankful to have a governor like Tim Walz, who we can always trust to lead with courage and put Minnesotans first.
The Trump campaign knows that Democrats must win Minnesota to win the White House next year. They're planning to spend tens of millions of dollars to stop that from happening, jeopardizing every race up and down the ballot in the process.
Governor Walz is working hard to hold the line, and we all need to make sure he has the resources to keep fighting. That's why, ahead of his critical end-of-year deadline on Tuesday, I wanted to ask for your help:
[**Will you contribute $5 or more right away to help Governor Walz finish 2019 strong and keep Minnesota blue?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kuAEDMNhu1LLdfilzivDDcPjo-0eZ4aaKEVJmYi36kE=/jEGcQ_xnGvIhYV_hgpRxDOkNaFSX1l9xITWtTkEec-Y=?refcode=body&amount=25)
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
********[Express Donate: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/kuAEDMNhu1LLdfilzivDDcPjo-0eZ4aaKEVJmYi36kE=/jEGcQ_xnGvIhYV_hgpRxDOkNaFSX1l9xITWtTkEec-Y=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=_25-2018)********
********[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/kuAEDMNhu1LLdfilzivDDcPjo-0eZ4aaKEVJmYi36kE=/jEGcQ_xnGvIhYV_hgpRxDOkNaFSX1l9xITWtTkEec-Y=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=_50-2018)********
********[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/kuAEDMNhu1LLdfilzivDDcPjo-0eZ4aaKEVJmYi36kE=/jEGcQ_xnGvIhYV_hgpRxDOkNaFSX1l9xITWtTkEec-Y=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=_100-2018)********
********[Express Donate: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/kuAEDMNhu1LLdfilzivDDcPjo-0eZ4aaKEVJmYi36kE=/jEGcQ_xnGvIhYV_hgpRxDOkNaFSX1l9xITWtTkEec-Y=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=_250-2018)********
********[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/kuAEDMNhu1LLdfilzivDDcPjo-0eZ4aaKEVJmYi36kE=/jEGcQ_xnGvIhYV_hgpRxDOkNaFSX1l9xITWtTkEec-Y=?refcode=_other-2018)********
Tim's 2019 fundraising totals will be made public for the first time shortly after the New Year. This is our first chance in 2020 to prove that Minnesotans have his back more than ever.
**There 's no battleground more critical than Minnesota and we can't afford to miss this opportunity. [Please make a contribution that works for you today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/kuAEDMNhu1LLdfilzivDDcPjo-0eZ4aaKEVJmYi36kE=/jEGcQ_xnGvIhYV_hgpRxDOkNaFSX1l9xITWtTkEec-Y=?refcode=body&amount=25)**
Thank you,
Walter Mondale
| ********[**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kuAEDMNhu1LLdfilzivDDcPjo-0eZ4aaKEVJmYi36kE=/jEGcQ_xnGvIhYV_hgpRxDOkNaFSX1l9xITWtTkEec-Y=?refcode=button-p&amount=25)********

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Hope it was great!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE
body:
I hope you and your family had a very Merry Christmas! As the year comes to a close (and what a year it’s been), I am looking forward to 2020 and the opportunity to continue to implement real conservative reforms in Washington. With all that happened this year, it’s more clear than ever that we need strong, sane leadership in Washington. We got to where we are today because of your hard work and that of the amazing support from conservatives like you. For that, I cannot thank you enough. _**But our hard work can’t stop.**_ With 2019 coming to a close, that means we are about to enter into one of most important Presidential election years in history, and we need to start this one as strong as possible. That’s why my team and I have set a goal of raising $10,000 before we close our books for this year, and I need your help. name: Cory Booker
subject: I'm asking you to be a 2019 founding member of our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
In just a few days, we'll turn the calendar on a brand new year. I couldn't be more excited for all that 2020 will bring, but first I wanted to let you know that this is your last chance to be a 2019
| | |
---
| Hey there, In just a few days, we'll turn the calendar on a brand new year. I couldn't be more excited for all that 2020 will bring, but first I wanted to let you know that [_**this is your last chance to be a 2019 founding member of our campaign. Will you donate right now to join us?**_](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191228_CB_20191228-fr-CB-foundingdnr1-ndnractives_ndnractives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I announced my candidacy for president almost eleven months ago and rooted it in the same principles I have fought for my entire career: That where there's unity, there is strength. **That when we join together and work together, we will rise together.** In just a few weeks, the first states will begin casting votes and joining their local caucus sites. Many folks are starting to make their final decisions on whom to support. But before they do, I want to make sure you had the chance to be a founding member of our campaign. [_**Are you in?**_](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191228_CB_20191228-fr-CB-foundingdnr1-ndnractives_ndnractives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") This isn't just about defeating Trump -- that's the floor, not the ceiling. It gets us out of the valley -- it does not get us to the mountaintop. At this moral moment in America, we need a leader who can bring people together to both beat Trump and make lasting, transformative change for our country. We're about to enter a new phase of this campaign, friend, and I want you to be a part of it. _**[I'm hoping you'll join me and thousands of our supporters in this fight.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191228_CB_20191228-fr-CB-foundingdnr1-ndnractives_ndnractives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_ Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191228_CB_20191228-fr-CB-foundingdnr1-ndnractives_ndnractives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c82/5fca0d19/7bc79d1a/291cf275/377834584/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c82/5fca0d19/7bc79d1a/291cf274/377834584/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c82/5fca0d19/7bc79d1a/291cf273/377834584/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c82/5fca0d19/7bc79d1a/291cf272/377834584/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

name: Michael (personal)
subject: no regrets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| I'm so grateful for you, team.

Even when the DNC blocked us from the debates, or when some of the pundits doubted us, or when we announced our most aggressive fundraising goal yet, you've stood strong.

Yesterday, we launched our first TV ad in New Hampshire. Now my team says we need at least 10 people from 18326 to donate today to stay on track to hit our goal tomorrow and keep our ads on TV.

[So can I count on you to make your first donation?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8be/134673f2/882b074/69979480/2036486245/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122819_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Coming from a politically diverse state like Colorado, I've never known an easy election. I knew running for president would be no different. But restoring decency to our highest office is worth the fight.

We can't let this election just become bickering over empty promises and policies we can't pass. We have to ignite our base while also winning back the places we lost in 2016. We've got to make sure everyone knows they have a president who's more concerned about their kids' future than the next tweet.

That's why I'm running. I'm the only candidate who's won two elections in a purple swing state, and I know how to bring people together to make sustainable progress.

But I can't do it alone. I need your help to keep fighting and make sure everyone sees our TV ad.

[So can you chip in $5 to my campaign for president? Every dollar we raise will get us closer to reaching our crucial $700,000 fundraising goal to invest in New Hampshire:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8be/134673f2/882b074/69979480/2036486245/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122819_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Yang2020.com
subject: We were outraised 200-250% by some of the more establishment campaigns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5254%2E377263%2E48yayu) Yang Gang --

**Here’s the truth:** Last quarter, despite posting a record fundraising number, we were outraised 200-250% by some of the more establishment campaigns.

They’re using this money to invest in ads, staff, and offices across every early state.

Now, we don’t need to match them dollar for dollar -- but we do need the resources to compete with the millions they have in their bank accounts.

[We have $1,618,747‬ left to raise before our FEC end-of-quarter deadline and only 85 hours left to do it. It’s going to take everyone on this team if we’re going to hit it and have our best quarter yet. Contribute $10 now to close the gap. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20610?t=5&akid=5254%2E377263%2E48yayu) | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20610?t=6&akid=5254%2E377263%2E48yayu)
---
Over 80% of our total fundraising comes from grassroots contributions like yours. That means what you do makes a big difference in determining if we rise or fall as a campaign.

Thank you for everything you do,

Yang2020

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Don't let Trump's attacks on immigrants slip under the radar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The Trump administration has continued its campaign against immigrants unabated by the impeachment proceedings. He promoted Chad Wolf, architect of the family separation policy, to be the top Homeland Security undersecretary and the de facto DHS chief. And that heinous policy is still in place, no matter how well the administration's tried to bury coverage of it. And even though lower courts have ruled consistently against his illegal decision to end DACA and set up DREAMers for deportation, the president took his appeal to the Supreme Court \-- where Trump's lawyers made it clear they intend to end the program and deport nearly a million people one way or another. This drastic step would devastate communities across the country and hurt those who are simply trying to live their lives in the only country they've known. They are our neighbors, friends, and family members. They are our teachers, co-workers, and strangers on the street worthy of safe and happy lives. We need 10,000 people to join us today, so if you agree with us, please add your name here: [**Demand Congress protect the DREAMers >>**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf07/6e9863e8/176d1e6b/1db04a46/1774708098/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/c917z-2m") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf07/6e9863e8/176d1e6b/1db04a4b/1774708098/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191228a.ND&refcode2=YMKNq8fmtcTVoHOdvgxL")

| | Hi Peter -- updating you quickly here. We're just four days until our last end of quarter deadline of 2019, so I'm checking our fundraising numbers at least fifteen times per day to make sure we're on pace. As of 7:32 a.m. CT this morning, we are falling slightly behind.

We've got to get back on track within the next few hours, or we risk breaking our pace to our December 31 goal. That means bringing in an additional $4,902 before this evening. Can you pitch in? Here's a link you can use so your contribution counts immediately toward our goal: **[https://mjfortexas.com/pacinggoal/Peter](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489065b/7f51f7bc/4a27ec14/4ef0385e/898268772/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191228.1nd__685__&amount=10&recurring=true")**.

Thanks so much,

Taylor Klos
TX Finance Director, MJ for Texas

name: Jason Yates
subject: America's next chapter
body:
| | Peter, We live in a time filled with moral confusion, spiritual chaos, and political division. And as our nation’s leaders seek to navigate through these uncharted waters, millions of Christ followers have been sitting on the sidelines. That’s why the team at My Faith Votes has been working faithfully to motivate, equip, and mobilize Christians to bring their values forward at the polls. And we need you. **When you support My Faith Votes, you become part of the solution to wake up the most powerful and important voting block - 90 million Christians in America.** You can help people like Bob, Jen, and Sheila: _“Our country needs a group such as My Faith Votes to begin a change in our values. To bring ALL CHRISTIANS together. We need to unite and stand up to be heard...to bring our country back to Christian morals and beliefs.”_ –Bob B., Arkansas _“I truly appreciate the integrity of My Faith Votes. They provide excellent resources and motivation for everyone to engage responsibly in the voting process. My Faith Votes enables me to stay up-to-date with what is going on around the country.”_ –Jen S., Pennsylvania _“I am extremely thankful for this site- My Faith Votes- gives me a sense of HOPE! I am sharing most of your posts on my page, hoping to encourage others to rely on Christ and to vote according to their faith!”_ –Sheila T., Michigan **Believers want information on how biblical principles relate to our nation’s most pressing problems, and they need voting resources made easy and accessible.** But we can’t do this without you and people like Beth who has linked arms with My Faith Votes and committed to helping us reach one million non-voting Christians in 2020. _“I personally felt helpless! I was introduced to My Faith Votes in 2016 through Dr. Ben Carson. I realized that this was my answer to honoring God and being supportive of a group of people who were in the battle for me.”_ –Beth D., North Carolina **Peter, if we want to see faith-driven solutions win in 2020 then we have to mobilize Christians to vote.** I believe you are willing to fight against these aggressive secular attacks and stand for our “one nation, under God.” Your faith is essential to influence the next chapter of America’s history. **[Please make an additional year-end donation right now. Thanks to a generous matching grant, every dollar you give will be instantly doubled to activate faith-driven voters in elections across our nation in 2020](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191228apl01nd&n=1).** No gift is too small. No one can do everything, but together we can all do something. Thank you for your donation today, your continued support of My Faith Votes, and your heart to stand united with other believers in defense of our values. [](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191228apl01nd&n=2) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191228apl01nd&n=3)
---
* * *
You subscribed [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive email updates from My Faith Votes. Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

[Update Subscription Preferences or Unsubscribe](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191228apl01nd&n=4)

© 2019 My Faith Votes, 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134, United States
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191228apl01nd&n=5) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191228apl01nd&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191228apl01nd&n=7)

name: G. Peters
subject: $500 million in taxpayer money wasted
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
Betsy DeVos' tenure as education secretary has been nothing short of reckless.
| | |
---
Friend,

Betsy DeVos' tenure as education secretary has been nothing short of reckless. She's constantly sided with wealthy corporations over our students and teachers.
**And now, reports have emerged that DeVos was instrumental in wasting $500 million dollars in taxpayer money on charter schools that closed or never opened - the majority of which were right here in Michigan.**
This is an abuse of Michigan and an abuse of public money, plain and simple. I intend to get to the bottom of it, but I need grassroots supporters like you to speak out against Betsy DeVos' wrongdoing as well.**Will you join me in calling for an education secretary who actually puts our students first?**
**[I'm hoping for 342 signatures before midnight, so add your name now to denounce Betsy DeVos and demand a better education secretary for our country.](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/gp-devos?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk176-su-nd")**
| | | [Sign the Petition](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/gp-devos?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk176-su-nd")
---
Thank you for speaking out. Michiganders deserve so much better than Betsy DeVos. Together, we can hold her accountable.

Gary

Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da902/5721a3ed/7061a3b7/efb43ea/2444755559/VEsC/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da902/5721a3ed/7061a3b7/efb43e9/2444755559/VEsD/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/update-your-info") We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. body:
---
| | I'm 72 hours from the biggest deadline of my entire life. I can't overstate how critical hitting my end-of-year goal is to flipping McConnell's Senate. [**So for the first time -- EVER -- generous Democrats just agreed to DOUBLE-MATCH gifts until my deadline. I need 2,489 supporters to step up. Will you be one of them?**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191228_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") | [](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191228_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")
`**NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com**` `[**Double-Match Your $10 >>**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191228_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")`
---

I say this with absolute certainty: This is our once-in-a-lifetime shot to remove McConnell from power.

But if I lose my Senate race, Democrats' chances drop to zero. Failing to meet my goal is not an option.

[**Can I count on your $10? The double match means your generous gift will go THREE times as far.**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191228_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")

Ben Ray

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?

name: Ed Markey
subject: reaching out before the deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
I wanted to reach out before the day got away from me to ask for your help before our FEC deadline. I'll keep this quick because I'm sure you've got a busy day planned too. | | | Friends -

I wanted to reach out before the day gets too busy to ask for your help before our FEC deadline. I'll keep this quick because I'm sure you've got a busy day planned too.

In just three days, we'll close the books on our last FEC deadline of 2019. Then it's onward to 2020 -- where I'm facing the toughest race of my life. I don't say that lightly.

My opponents are going to spend millions trying to defeat our movement. Right as we're making incredible progress and building support for our bold ideas like the Green New Deal. There's never been a more important time for us to come together to fight back.

If you're with me, please make a $3 donation to support our grassroots campaign heading into 2020. Here's a link you can use:

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfe2/693b8b0a/436f4575/72de7026/3310958522/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191228-full")**

The only way we will win is if we do this together, every step of the way. It won't be easy, but I know this fight is worth it. Nothing could be more important than saving our planet.

Thank you,

Ed

---

name: Alice Jones, Team Mondaire
subject: I’m Mondaire’s Grandma
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire Jones for Congress Mondaire Jones for Congress
body:
Hi Friend, my name is Alice Jones — I’m Mondaire’s grandma. There aren’t enough words to describe how proud I am, how full my heart is to see my grandson run for Congress. | | | Hi Friend, my name is Alice Jones**— I’m Mondaire’s grandma.** There aren’t enough words to describe how proud I am, how full my heart is to see my grandson run for Congress. I promise I’m not just saying this because we’re family — I truly believe if we want a fighter in Congress, someone who will look out for families like yours and mine, there’s no one better than Mondaire. **_I know it because I helped teach him how to be a fighter._** **[But before I continue sharing some stories about Mondaire, will you consider chipping in $5 or $10 so he can reach every voter?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3QA/ni0YAA/t.2xx/hamXH6ypSBW5MuIztAM1xQ/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwRyFCg6LEiYi08sDxtzbPgbYOyIbGSi5PinKghouXO61eY8YnSpc6u-2FPPV1J5QBlELa2lZgR-2BjM-2FMNqvWmlowi3epDhMM6YPGjhLmK63Z-2BBoy6bmpXyaSkP5BPYvn5DDATWf943MtYZPB0wtykKWcFps8lpDh6VS9nr9azN57f6V-2FeYYYyVAskS2RI3kEV0L3cBFtW-2Fe9wt13zxVldxRT0P8440N1vAum3TkLgGLH3pU-3D/T6i8)** His campaign told me they’re trying to reach a goal before the end of the year so I promised I’d help out. [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3QA/ni0YAA/t.2xx/hamXH6ypSBW5MuIztAM1xQ/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwRyFCg6LEiYi08sDxtzbPgbYOyIbGSi5PinKghouXO634NG5NBdMl3pNsgYj4RZUGEeogdBgfkGhlcUaxvkaGBZO33JZ-2FphoWVz8mCe7CC8h3Akalgx7PVbbhc2cHVEA4P9VV2AkaK0yK-2FS0t9mCi0Ggpzys-2FKZ10bhrh8IuL5gMEBKDOY5xYR0PuPwC01FU9Jv5zuSNhtcwhLMAtMxkIi464NTR3XRFgAHg9NI54rk4-3D/HY7u) [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3QA/ni0YAA/t.2xx/hamXH6ypSBW5MuIztAM1xQ/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwRyFCg6LEiYi08sDxtzbPgbYOyIbGSi5PinKghouXO63oBOhemJ8wN4wpU0Ixg01Wc-2FQAMaEkV9Pj1m4I23bxFzLf91uk4u7e9-2FiI2GxYGANEw5X-2BeQ3b7oQ2uxE1VQYBLhfE6wvZYHP783McKUqhy8AJ5s-2F7uvFYIrvsiv1Wixaazf7Njtw3-2FTaac98ktL0xOo-2BZeu85QM5P4ptFLpkDmgB1TpBu5JmB-2F9VyUpRakTQ-3D/wjDb) You see, I used to clean houses in Rockland County. Our family didn’t always have money for daycare, so I’d bring Mondaire along with me. He saw firsthand how our family fought to make ends meet, how me and his mom juggled jobs to put food on the table. But I always reminded him — it doesn’t matter how much money our family has, if you live in public housing, or if your dinner comes from food stamps — you can be anything you want. You just have to fight for it. **And that’s exactly what he did.** He fought to get a great college education, to go to Harvard Law School, and make a living. But he didn’t stop there — he worked for President Obama along the way, and he remembered where he came from and returned to where he grew up to fight for everyone else looking for their chance at the American Dream. Fast forward to today — it’s incredible seeing how many people are rooting for my grandson as he works to bring this fight to Congress. It fills me with pride and happiness to see how far he’s come. ******[I hope you can help out as the campaign races to meet their fundraising goal by December 31st. They told me you can chip in anything you can, just please help them reach 3,000 grassroots donations.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3QA/ni0YAA/t.2xx/hamXH6ypSBW5MuIztAM1xQ/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwRyFCg6LEiYi08sDxtzbPgbYOyIbGSi5PinKghouXO63wWmsLEphC5CdHLh9Qg5fexTOuhS2-2BUpJblfo4lxBQdZoQ9Ik8DNRzz7FepwU9ivTyYZQwS6uBSZ072RwwLk-2FZ-2B23OC8I0YzJpaBP08BKoxJ7X6LTOJ-2BEUJN5zc8jE2eOVhLV1ibBdqdt7rgJfWH0kCMgGY1mHn7VIjSHeL90f6RYwgTTCDCw80Ji5WVE8C6U-3D/yomS)******
