name: Tim Kaine
subject: John Hickenlooper
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Team, My friend John Hickenlooper is an innovator and a problem solver. As a small business owner, former Mayor of Denver, and two-term Governor of Colorado, he's dedicated his career to improving the lives of his fellow Coloradans -- and that's exactly why we need him in the United States Senate. I'll be honest, team. The National Republican Senatorial Committee is counting on holding onto this seat. They've got an extensive donor network, and they're not afraid to use it. So getting John to the Senate is going to be an uphill battle. But they're underestimating him if they think he won't give it all he's got! **The end of the year is a really important time for campaign fundraising. The donations that John gets before closing out this quarter will help him build up the infrastructure he needs to talk to Colorado voters next year. If you can, please make a contribution to John 's campaign today:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191228-tk?refcode=em-191228-tk-b&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
[CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191228-tk?refcode=em-191228-tk-b&amount=25&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191228-tk?refcode=em-191228-tk-b&amount=50&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191228-tk?refcode=em-191228-tk-b&amount=100&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191228-tk?refcode=em-191228-tk-b&amount=250&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191228-tk?refcode=em-191228-tk-b&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
Friend, the Senate ought to be a place where we get things done for the American people. But for way too long now, the GOP has been wholly dedicated to killing off legislation in the upper chamber that would help us tackle some of our biggest problems. In comparison, John is a practical businessman who has focused on getting things done to make life better for folks in his state.
And you know what? He's got a pretty great track record. As Mayor of Denver, he brought a light rail system to the city to improve the quality of life and totally eliminated the city's budget deficit. As Governor of Colorado, he signed Medicaid expansion into law and took Colorado from 40th in job growth to the number one economy in the country.
I'm so glad Hick is stepping up to run for Senate and help Democrats take back the majority. I want to bring his determination and problem-solving attitude to the halls of the Capitol to work by my side. **Will you help? Chip in whatever you can today:**
[DONATE](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191228-tk?refcode=em-191228-tk-b&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
Thank you so much,
Tim Kaine

Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado

clean_body: | Team, My friend John Hickenlooper is an innovator and a problem solver. As a small business owner, former Mayor of Denver, and two-term Governor of Colorado, he's dedicated his career to improving the lives of his fellow Coloradans -- and that's exactly why we need him in the United States Senate. I'll be honest, team. The National Republican Senatorial Committee is counting on holding onto this seat. They've got an extensive donor network, and they're not afraid to use it. So getting John to the Senate is going to be an uphill battle. But they're underestimating him if they think he won't give it all he's got! The end of the year is a really important time for campaign fundraising. The donations that John gets before closing out this quarter will help him build up the infrastructure he needs to talk to Colorado voters next year. If you can, please make a contribution to John 's campaign today: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "=" "=" | "=" "=" | "=" "=" Friend, the Senate ought to be a place where we get things done for the American people. But for way too long now, the GOP has been wholly dedicated to killing off legislation in the upper chamber that would help us tackle some of our biggest problems. In comparison, John is a practical businessman who has focused on getting things done to make life better for folks in his state. And you know what? He's got a pretty great track record. As Mayor of Denver, he brought a light rail system to the city to improve the quality of life and totally eliminated the city's budget deficit. As Governor of Colorado, he signed Medicaid expansion into law and took Colorado from 40th in job growth to the number one economy in the country. I'm so glad Hick is stepping up to run for Senate and help Democrats take back the majority. I want to bring his determination and problem-solving attitude to the halls of the Capitol to work by my side. Will you help? Chip in whatever you can today: "=" Thank you so much, Tim Kaine Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218 ""

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: USA Today poll: Trump beats Warren by 8
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | "WASHINGTON - President Donald Trump, the first modern president to face impeachment during his first term in the White House, now leads his top Democratic rivals in his bid for a second, a new USA TODAY/Suffolk University Poll finds. "The national survey, taken as the House of Representatives planned an impeachment vote and the Senate a trial, showed Trump defeating former Vice President Joe Biden by 3 percentage points, Vermont Sen. Bernie Sanders by 5 points, and Massachusetts Sen. Elizabeth Warren by 8 points. "In hypothetical head-to-head contests, Trump also led South Bend, Indiana, Mayor Pete Buttigieg by 10 points and former New York City Mayor Michael Bloomberg by 9." \-- _USA Today_ Given the rapid shift in support toward President Trump, we need to know if your feelings toward him have changed. **Will you vote for Trump in 2020?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf6a/6e9863e8/176f4220/1db04a4e/1825350328/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/aRgfFTKS") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf6a/6e9863e8/176f4220/1db04a4e/1825350328/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/aRgfFTKS") Thank you for your response, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf6a/6e9863e8/176f4220/1db04a4d/1825350328/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191228b.ND&refcode2=jA3S9z1tRk9Yuy86XxKL")

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: A good chunk behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Nobody gets this done on their own. It's about the values we share, and the fights we take on together. We won before because we built a grassroots movement, and that's how we'll win again... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852be3a/45c30650/11419953b/66faa5b4/265666547/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
When I first ran for the U.S. Senate, I started out 17 points down from the popular Republican incumbent who had truckfulls of campaign cash from Wall Street.

Massachusetts had never elected a woman to the U.S. Senate before -- and a lot of people thought we still weren't ready to elect one in 2012. They wished me luck but said we didn't stand a chance.

But then we won -- _by 7.5 points_.

I'm no stranger to tough fights. I know how to fight, and more importantly, I know how to win -- and right now, winning this is going to take resources.

**Together, we've raised over $17 million for the quarter -- but that means we're a good chunk behind where we were at this point last quarter. If we don't pick up the pace right now, we won't be in the strongest possible position heading into 2020.**

**[We've set a goal of raising $20 million before December 31-- and I'm reaching out today because I need the help of some of our strongest supporters to get there. Will you chip in what you can right now to help meet this critical goal?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852be3a/45c30650/11419953b/66faa5b7/265666547/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTFQRl9FT1FfQklPX0VfMjAxOTEyMjhfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM1PF_EOQ_BIO_E_20191228_V1S1_P")**

>
Nobody gets this done on their own. It's about the values we share, and the fights we take on _together_. We won before because we built a grassroots movement, and that's how we'll win again.

We have a plan to organize in all 50 states -- and build grassroots momentum in communities all over the country. We're taking our message to voters far and wide and giving people a reason to show up and vote. And we can't do it without you.

**We're not done fighting yet -- but we don't have a lot of time left to get this done.** **[Please contribute $2, or whatever you can, to help reach our $20 million goal before the December 31 FEC deadline.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852be3a/45c30650/11419953b/66faa5b7/265666547/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTFQRl9FT1FfQklPX0VfMjAxOTEyMjhfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM1PF_EOQ_BIO_E_20191228_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| | Following Steve Chabot's shameful conduct in the impeachment hearings and the announcement that he's under investigation for misusing campaign funds, a group of Democratic donors have announced that they will match ALL donations that come in before our public end of year deadline. 2020 will be one of the most important elections of our lifetimes -- the outcome will make it into history books. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Following Steve Chabot's shameful conduct in the impeachment hearings and the announcement that he's under investigation for misusing campaign funds, **a group of Democratic donors have announced that they will match ALL donations that come in before our public end of year deadline.** **2020 will be one of the most important elections of our lifetimes** \-- the outcome will make it into history books. **When school classes read about this election, we hope they 're reading about a historic movement to make our country better for future generations** \-- a rejection of corruption and a move toward advocacy for working families. body:

| | Friend, After a full year of campaigning, we're now headed toward the beginning of voting and that means turning every part of our team in to high gear. **We 're going to be:**
* boosting our ads ([which we hope you've had a chance to see](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc966/3eb3e2fc/69b5604c/744ed411/2989447111/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-castro-2020-primary?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+which+we+hope+yoursquove+had+a+chance+to&utm_campaign=20191228_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191228_em_fr_b1_castro_all"))
* expanding our base of organizers and volunteers
* deploying as many resources as possible to the Early States

[We've got a plan to make sure we can persuade as many voters as possible and make a huge impact when voting begins. But, we can't do it without your support. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc966/3eb3e2fc/69b5604c/744ed410/2989447111/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+Wersquove+got+a+plan+to+make+sure+we+can&utm_campaign=20191228_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191228_em_fr_b1_castro_all") We have to hit our end of year fundraising goal in order to make it possible. [So whether you can chip in $1, $15, or $50, we need you to give before this critical deadline to make sure we can enact every bit of our plans. Please, give now before we run out of time. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc966/3eb3e2fc/69b5604c/744ed41f/2989447111/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A ---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc966/3eb3e2fc/69b5604c/744ed405/2989447111/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191228_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191228_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc966/3eb3e2fc/69b5604c/744ed404/2989447111/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191228_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191228_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc966/3eb3e2fc/69b5604c/744ed403/2989447111/VEsHAA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=20191228_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191228_em_fr_b1_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: TinaforMinnesota.com
subject: Have you seen this photo?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
There's something you need to know about these two photos we're about to show you...

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191228-photos?refcode=em191228-photos&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Folks, there's something you need to know about these guys...

[](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191228-photos?refcode=em191228-photos&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10")

**Donald Trump thinks he can win Minnesota in 2020.** After losing by just 1.5 percentage points in 2016, he's going to make sure our state doesn't slip through his fingers again. Trump even endorsed our opponent, Jason Lewis, and has already pledged to come back next year -- which is why we're expecting him to barnstorm Minnesota any chance he gets because he's so intent on flipping it red.

But not if Tina has anything to say about it. Here she is:

[](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191228-photos?refcode=em191228-photos&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10")

**Tina is running for re-election in 2020.** She's been working her tail off in the Senate to do right by Minnesotans. From health care to climate change -- and everything in between -- she's been on the frontlines on the issues that matter most. We can't afford to lose her, or Minnesota, to the Republicans.

So, here's where we ask:

**Can you chip in $10 or more to keep a champion like Tina Smith in the Senate and make sure Donald Trump doesn't flip Minnesota red in 2020? Your contribution before our critical end-of-year FEC deadline will make a huge difference for our campaign.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191228-photos?refcode=em191228-photos&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

body:
There’s a lot on the line in the 2020 election, to say the least. We need to elect principled leaders to the U.S. Senate who are going to protect and | | | [](http://links.bollierforkansas.com/u/click?_t=9b0f889d9ec84544b5cf693bbcca79a1&_m=797fd397ca9c49ba8b549f4488ebad3e&_e=WPOTZZOlmImqDdPc777uUjm83wdYcdp3iQoy66TCVDGxW4aQrRJMdE7kZgijAZ7Fdy6Byt1z8GFGCf675fji0RFTMbNMkbCuFmbieoWx7x0jxVG93xrTKuxgZmovafJ_O8avo2bb294PJ83SnvC0z1VYuWpI3KEQmn4KcuFuqx3ywo3qa1io9FwyqmvYXAeeODs2Jh0yDR7lDYue8NZFVvR2enQ-9cI4jZUx83J2lHYDCexI3-PW7w1-QF1IVd_zTzRwkDYhEUs_-Q_bLBpIA0ERYis6j9miMxpa44awnXxQeOruOoUPemjN0syXFSaBKz4DsUQAU3DzbePsZg-5Oa-kW40SzKuliMXlzy-Cfqq66jwzbUngDQ0k7ZxJIl1QgKkXNQYOgqsX-eCOsoAJLuxi7cYmEmowIIBj9lrmgqbqmko8iqNOU74qZUCkyXQcucSTU0g7xnhS3UEdPsM-kw%3D%3D) Hi , it’s Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer. There’s a lot on the line in the 2020 election, to say the least. We need to elect principled leaders to the U.S. Senate who are going to protect and expand affordable healthcare, clean up our democracy, promote economic growth for all and so much more. We need leaders like Barbara Bollier. She’s ready to give Kansas the commonsense representation it deserves -- and I can’t wait to work with her in the Senate. [**Kansas is key to helping Democrats regain our majority in the Senate. That’s why I’m asking for your help. Will you make a contribution to ensure we can compete and name: MJ Hegar
subject: my reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Here they are.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489062d/7f51f7bc/4a386824/4ef03846/852952521/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hi Peter,

I hope your holiday season has been joyful and restful. I've spent the last few days enjoying some downtime with my family, and I'm ready to start off the new year in just a few days reminded of the top two reasons I decided to run for Senate. Here they are getting ready for Christmas Eve: | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489062d/7f51f7bc/4a386824/4ef03844/852952521/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191228.2nd__709__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
I got into this because, like so many other folks across Texas and beyond, I can't accept the mess we're leaving for our kids. I'm not a politician, so running for Senate wasn't some next step in a master plan for me.

But I care a whole lot about taking on climate change and conserving our environment so that our kids have a clean, thriving planet to live on. I care about protecting and improving health care so they can live long and healthy lives and passing gun reforms so they're safe going to school, or a concert, or the movies. My opponent, Sen. Cornyn, hasn't given us any reason to believe he cares about those things.

**[If you're with me, I hope you'll pitch in to this campaign so we can work together to create a better future for the next generation.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489062d/7f51f7bc/4a386824/4ef03844/852952521/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191228.2nd__709__&amount=10&recurring=true")** We have less than one year left to build the campaign we need to win, and I know we can do it if we work together.

Thanks,
MJ Hegar

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489062d/7f51f7bc/4a386824/4ef03844/852952521/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191228.2nd__709__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

|
---

name: Cory Booker
subject: What a year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
2019 showed us over and over how unfit Donald Trump is to lead this country.
| | |
---
| Team -- It's hard to believe 2019 is almost over. I usually spend most of my time looking forward, but this year deserves a look back -- at the good, the bad, the ugly. The ugly is obvious. 2019 showed us over and over how unfit Donald Trump is to lead this country. We saw children locked in cages at the border and how people were denied their right to seek asylum here. We watched him roll back Obama-era regulations designed to keep our air and water clean and combat climate change. We witnessed him spout racist comments about four congresswomen of color. And of course, he committed impeachable offenses along the way. **Luckily, 2019 is coming to an end -- and in 2020, we can replace Donald Trump and start righting the wrongs he 's done, as well as wrongs that existed long before he took office.** [_**Will you chip in to my campaign right now to help make sure we not only kick Trump out of the White House but start the hard work of fixing some of our country 's most persistent problems?**_](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191228_CB_20191228-fr-CB-2019reflection-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") 2019 wasn't all bad though. Early on this year, I got to stand by my mom as I signed the papers to officially launch my candidacy for president -- a moment I'll never ever forget. I've spent 11 months traveling across this country, meeting folks from every walk of life. The whole experience has only strengthened my belief that we all have way more in common than we think; that the ties that bind us are so much stronger than the lines that divide us; and that if we rekindle our sense of common purpose, we can come together to achieve things others say are impossible. I know all of that may sound overly sentimental to some, but it's the holidays, team. If there's ever a moment to get a little emotional about new possibilities, it's now. But I'm not blind to reality. I know the road ahead for an underdog campaign like ours won't be easy. Thanks to you, we have a path to winning this nomination and beating Donald Trump. And with your help, I know that we can pull off something incredible. [_**We 're closing in on our grassroots goal -- just $260,790 away with three days to go. Make a donation before the end of 2019, and let's start 2020 with resolve to make it a historic year.**_](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191228_CB_20191228-fr-CB-2019reflection-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191228_CB_20191228-fr-CB-2019reflection-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---

---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c8d/5fca0d19/7bcbffeb/291cf068/217954719/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c8d/5fca0d19/7bcbffeb/291cf077/217954719/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c8d/5fca0d19/7bcbffeb/291cf076/217954719/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c8d/5fca0d19/7bcbffeb/291cf075/217954719/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c8d/5fca0d19/7bcbffeb/291cf069/217954719/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Team Yang
subject: Alarming news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We might not make it

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5263%2E377263%2EbeYnW2) Yang Gang --

We have some alarming news: **Our data team just crunched the numbers -- and we’re in serious danger of missing our end-of-quarter goal of $3 million by December 31st at midnight.**

Right now, we’re $1,544,992 away from hitting our goal. That means -- if we hit it -- we’ll have had our strongest fundraising weekend in our campaign’s history. **It’s not impossible, but it’s definitely a longshot.** And we all know how the Yang Gang feels about longshots.

[If there’s ever been a time to step up and make a contribution to this campaign, now’s the time. Please chip in with a donation of $10 or more right now. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20617?t=5&akid=5263%2E377263%2EbeYnW2) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20617?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=5263%2E377263%2EbeYnW2)

If you have friends who’ve expressed interest in Andrew’s candidacy, please forward this email to them and let them know that our campaign is completely driven by grassroots donations. Without them -- and without you -- we cannot exist.

**We can do this, but we need everyone to pitch in.**

Team Yang

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Progress, Hope, and Expectations
body:
Peter,

With the new year and the new decade approaching, I want to share with you my plan to make a difference in Houston, the core elements of which are progress, hope, and expectations.

PROGRESS

I intend to usher in a new era of progress when I am in office. I refuse to be governed by antiquated ideals, and will not allow our district to succumb to old-minded or outdated values. I will fight for the continued equality and opportunity of every person in our district and in our nation, because no person is less than any other.

HOPE

As I have traveled throughout the district, I have seen the conspicuous absence of hope. Our neighbors have given up on their leaders, because they feel their leaders have given up on them. We must remind those we strive to represent that their voices are heard. We must remind them that we advocate on their behalf, and that we will never give up on them.

EXPECTATIONS

Over the last few years, the expectations of our political leaders has fallen drastically. Our district deserves someone who will fight for them, and who will hold themselves to a higher standard. More so, they need someone who will hold other leaders to a higher standard. I will not stand for injustice, illegitimacy, or subterfuge. I will fight tirelessly for the truth, and I will always hold my colleagues accountable to do the right thing for the American people.
Donate today! (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=0b684013e8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_27_06_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-0b684013e8-32267927)
http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=0b684013e8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_27_06_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-0b684013e8-32267927

** We can do better, together.
------------------------------------------------------------

With your help through donations and volunteerism, we can start this decade off by electing leaders we admire, rather than accepting those we tolerate. Let's pave the way toward a new era of representation. An era of advocates and forward thinkers, who will not abandon their community the second they enter office. Let's do better, together.
Join us in the new year...
I need your help to become the next representative of District 18. Let's kick off this decade with strength and conviction. Donate $25 today (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=0b684013e8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_27_06_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-0b684013e8-32267927) , and we will begin our final push for the March primary.

**

Express Donate: $5 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=0b684013e8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_27_06_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-0b684013e8-32267927)

Express Donate: $10 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=0b684013e8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_27_06_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-0b684013e8-32267927)

Express Donate: $25 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=0b684013e8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_27_06_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-0b684013e8-32267927)

Or, donate another amount (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?refcode=express_lane_other&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=0b684013e8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_27_06_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-0b684013e8-32267927)

------------------------------------------------------------
Thank you for your support! Victory is within our grasp; all we need to do is reach for it.

Marc

| Peter, We’re doing a special Flash Match just for the OU-LSU game. This generous offer to double your support ends at midnight tonight so act now to help power our campaign to take back Oklahoma's 5th district.

We just have 3 days left until the end of the fundraising deadline so every dollar counts!

We need all the help we can get if we are going to successfully win this primary and send impeachment-first Kendra Horn packing, so here's the challenge.

Click on the donate button below and donate what you think the combined score of today's game is going to be. Help support our campaign and show off your football instincts at the same time! If you don't feel like you can guess accurately (this game is going to be a nailbiter) then donate the amount that corresponds to your favorite player's jersey!

| | | ,

**GOOD NEWS: **We are surpassing everyone’s expectations for this campaign. When we first launched this campaign, _some folks told us that running a campaign based on working class values in Texas wasn’t possible._ You’ve helped us prove them wrong. We’ve knocked over 30,000 doors, gotten great media coverage, and have attended scores of events.

**BAD NEWS:** We are a little behind on our December fundraising goal. To keep this campaign going strong, we need your help. _Roger Williams has money coming from the banks, the real estate moguls, and the big corporations._ To beat him, we need people like you to donate today so we can get our message out there. It’s the demand of the people that creates real change!

name: Team Canning for Congress
subject: Endorsement Alert: Sunrise Movement Eugene
body:
To ensure we’re on the right track to win in 2020, we’ll need to raise $16,650 by 9 pm Oregon time on New Year's Eve. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3AA/ni0YAA/t.2xx/mEz5pXoTSf2wP1Yz7xunHw/h0/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCyiK7xXkJftbeIVM7HbMWah-2F-2FTUy7T-2FpE-2Ban7TzilxtVHMJk6Ko3XMudiK22ctjhsmRptTnUeLyseIwv7dBH718lKf1rBobUru90TdXbJgZpm0LGaMr1g0lKw4KMqV90lu5Zw1HbF-2B4U1bgqSdhkQRBV66APZPfk87Xh7wAeX87BMITngnkI9i96BUQU5N725tRgEAS50kJe5tojETt0z0GsRV-2FJIjYl-2BqGB3JgYVpEuWgo09GHO4ZK2-2FRDpCxCrgY-3D/ScU9)
---
|
---
"**Sunrise Eugene will endorse Doyle Canning to represent OR-04 in Congress. **The Sunrise Movement is endorsing candidates who are fighting passionately for a Green New Deal, for a clean environment, and for a just future for all. We believe in electing climate champions who _will do whatever is necessary to achieve these goals_. We believe that we can reach 100% renewable energy by 2030 and that it will require creative, hopeful, and passionate leaders to help get us there. We believe Doyle Canning is one of those leaders." -- Sunrise Movement, Eugene
---
Friend, Our campaign is surging as we announce another critical local endorsement before 2020 arrives: The Sunrise Movement of Eugene, which now joins Sunrise Movement Corvallis in backing Canning for Congress, on the ground in the district. The young people leading the fight for the Green New Deal to stabilize our climate and create millions of jobs are throwing their weight behind Doyle, and their leadership on both the Oregon State University and University of Oregon campuses will be crucial to winning this primary election. But we are still $16,650 short of our goal. Every dollar you can send to the campaign right now will go directly into our field plan to win in 2020. **[Friend, I have to ask because this is really important. Can you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today to help ensure we reach our end-of-quarter goal by New Year's Eve?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3AA/ni0YAA/t.2xx/mEz5pXoTSf2wP1Yz7xunHw/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKPj9S5dRtR9nVdq7nW05v05-2Fi7D9J-2Fqhj-2F46hEBctJ7P-2FqeWsVA6iVYTz9NXF04yBMZQPVgEN-2Fkj3wTlX4eMmou7Ay8BJNVw7-2BMaYkAYqmnQsXxZQrEgkX53qRO4ld452p2uBREgcIRo6AjEPwzqzjDn38lYk-2B5FFl7dTupFjyFeiAVB8SFvYHyWHk0pq1hYoijHrerYiC0HgowvUDF5gF0us3RkiRTqNsIsNLQ-2F0UIGwRxzn2KoETrCYM8DBepACYlb5W9mXQxvSVvTmngwx0/Nh2K)**
---
[ **DONATE TODAY** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3AA/ni0YAA/t.2xx/mEz5pXoTSf2wP1Yz7xunHw/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKPj9S5dRtR9nVdq7nW05v0RrXTMsgpMVixuEZwp9uPDV7qBTYpWu78fONtzFvAmVBZDjBtEZlno116whfoOPtOLHoJGJ-2BIZU62mvB4HJ0NbR498VSDAkny7FYCM-2BhI-2FrCQXKGTYuDV4YPVNGMXAJnEmUR7glgG5cVHRD2ev8FplxBCgDZ4mK-2BxUlvXQWLiKnJ6mcdSldysYGoMRBaA-2Fkvru-2FMKudhAHNmISA9JhqAQMkV7DAwjaVo5G6Tt-2FzO4NBScOzGpOS80oZyaIJ4K-2B7SB/1fbo)
---
We are so proud that since this campaign launched we have received the endorsement of eight local progressive groups, and the national endorsement of 350 Action. But we have a lot more to do to build our coalition! We are looking to open offices in Corvallis and Coos Bay, set up a voter registration program on campuses, launch our door-to-door canvassing, and order yard signs. We need your support to keep going and to win this campaign. **[Friend, 2020 will be here before you know it. Now is the time to organize. Can I count on your support?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3AA/ni0YAA/t.2xx/mEz5pXoTSf2wP1Yz7xunHw/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKPj9S5dRtR9nVdq7nW05v0uuJXVMuzhyuTCmoJfdrlNcuoJN-2F6QnVraq185lJuvUksPfgvy3ESr7tv39Xir3xLRtuK-2FiFO9lwVjdTxHxF90kTojEKOHF5hZP9RsbsL-2BtT8-2F-2F5tEUksHcVyVz2qkjfWD-2BEWBhzlny0nJpIp3wjZn24dDfoswufETVRAsRPJPOi-2F-2BUKkJkllx88ANSm5893cHNt4S-2FDHdegqTiLrQHpePpnxLaWmEC179efsISstGyp-2BQVV-2FmWWInPQF8SvWH3BT/QRw5)** Onward, Team Canning for Congress
---
|
---
Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! [You can make a contribution to her campaign here.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3AA/ni0YAA/t.2xx/mEz5pXoTSf2wP1Yz7xunHw/h4/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJfvvN8qBuq7ZECa2iJJ-2Fwva5CFnSQuMcnMtO7C5Jl944rrx75Hl-2FUqOy4F35Y6eU-2FyZD4YP47214FukGbKmIJiys5XFHjM0vSF3NjMFpTibR2xdKqSWLwEQBPYpdwIqmzvwEArYLVVQ-2BjH-2B488bYOvsX2qrJOL5Sy7IcbmP5aw-2BifmGQuAuO9SkMRd5jixje3ZLOephzAgYs1ZxIosyQSqIiqKZGbZaJ3dMwzYe046OBUYIgTdrIS-2BjMUYmCbROkgYOtlt9Hhq2rCZTB1AmsUu/IguC "Donate to Doyle Canning")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: Peter, Iowa farmers deserve an ally in Congress.
body:
The Democrats have proven themselves incapable of getting it done for Iowa farmers. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/this-impeachment-drama-is-hurting-america-1523889?e=90fad69796)
---
| | [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=9c721bd85e&e=90fad69796)
---
| [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=ee82b6b95c&e=90fad69796)
---
| | Peter, Farmers are the backbone of our state and our country.

They keep us fed, secure as an independent nation, and are an engine for prosperity in our economy.

But Washington is failing them right now, and hyper-partisan Democrats are to blame.

When President Trump came to Washington and finally stood up for fair trade, he negotiated a fantastic new trade deal for North America called USMCA.

This new deal would be excellent for Iowa farmers and help them finally have real access to our trading partners and give them the protections against predatory practices they need.

But because Nancy Pelosi is terrified of giving the President a win on ANYTHING, she stalled the deal in Congress for almost a year and only passed it at the very end to give cover for her impeachment-crazed caucus. It was shameful behavior.

It goes to show how important it is we flip the House in 2020. Iowa farmers deserve an ally in Congress. Districts like ours are the key to getting it done. We have a major deadline coming up in just three days that is going to determine whether we can win in 2020.

[**Will you donate $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 by our deadline in just 3 days to help us fight for Iowa farmers and flip the House in 2020?**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=5fcebc415e&e=90fad69796)
---
| [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=b85cc239bf&e=90fad69796)
---
| This is a conservative district. It voted for President Trump by five points in 2016. We can flip it, I'm sure of it, but it's going to take resources that the other side is going to have in spades from the coasts.

There are only a few dozen competitive House races each year, and my race in IA-02 is going to be one of the most competitive. If we want to win the House back, we must win Iowa's 2nd Congressional District.

[**Please consider donating $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 by midnight tonight so we can be in a strong position by our deadline in 3 days and stand by our Iowa farmers. **](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=34b2c2d566&e=90fad69796)

For Iowa,
[](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=71d2d8611c&e=90fad69796)
Bobby Schilling
---
| [Donate Now ›](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=bd3dae9545&e=90fad69796 "Donate Now ›")
---
| | | | | | | [](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=ff4fa6fb3d&e=90fad69796)
---
| | [](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=7af9def90e&e=90fad69796)
---
| | [](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=26e52ad785&e=90fad69796)

We can flip it, I'm sure of it, but it's going to take resources that the other side is going to have in spades from the coasts. There are only a few dozen competitive House races each year, and my race in IA-02 is going to be one of the most competitive. If we want to win the House back, we must win Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. For Iowa, Bobby Schilling | "Donate Now ›" | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2019 Bobby for Iowa, All rights reserved.

subject: a year of lessons

body:
| | |

| | Friend, **I 'm so proud of the campaign we've built together.** We've shaped the debate on so many important issues, and your input has been invaluable in ensuring we put people first in every aspect of our campaign. When we crafted our Equality for People with Disabilities plan, we did it by working with accessibility leaders who have led on these issues for years. Together, members of my team and I visited homeless encampments, met with advocacy leaders, and talked with homeowners and renters about the struggles they face. [Donate >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc967/3eb3e2fc/69ba5e18/744ed722/2305490345/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+Donate+gtgt&utm_campaign=20191228_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191228_em_fr_b2_castro_all") Before I released a plan to eliminate lead as a major health threat, I visited Flint and met with folks on the frontline of the water crisis. We worked with tribal leaders before releasing the first Indigenous communities policy to better understand how we can build relationships based on respect. Each plan is more than a set of policies and goals we'd like to achieve--they are roadmaps designed with the help of countless people whose work and lives will be impacted the most. It's been an incredibly humbling and enlightening experience. I couldn't be more thankful to have your support as we head into the New Year together. **No one person has the answers to all of our problems, and we get better by learning from each other.** This campaign continues to get better because of you. We know that the year ahead will be even better than the last. [We're heading toward an end of year fundraising deadline that directly affects how big we can go before voting begins. Please chip in now and let's make sure we blow them away. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc967/3eb3e2fc/69ba5e18/744ed721/2305490345/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc967/3eb3e2fc/69ba5e18/744ed717/2305490345/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191228_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191228_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc967/3eb3e2fc/69ba5e18/744ed716/2305490345/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191228_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191228_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc967/3eb3e2fc/69ba5e18/744ed715/2305490345/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191228_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191228_em_fr_b2_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

The days of billionaires freeloading off of the economy while more and more working people struggle to get by are over.

We're fighting for big, structural change, and a government that works for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected. **And with our brand new, limited-edition "Tax the Ultra-Rich" sticker, you can let everyone know what this movement is all about!**

If you've been waiting to make a donation, this is a crucial moment for our movement. We're tracking behind our fundraising goals and Elizabeth is counting on grassroots donors to make up the difference. Your contribution would have a major impact on the future of this campaign and our organizing operation. That's why we want to thank everyone who chips in today with a FREE sticker.

[**If you make your first donation today, of any amount -- whether it's $1, $2, or $5 -- we'll send you a FREE sticker. clean_body: And with our brand new, limited-edition "Tax the Ultra-Rich" sticker, you can let everyone know what this movement is all about! | | | "" The days of billionaires freeloading off of the economy while more and more working people struggle to get by are over. We're fighting for big, structural change, and a government that works for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected. And with our brand new, limited-edition "Tax the Ultra-Rich" sticker, you can let everyone know what this movement is all about! If you've been waiting to make a donation, this is a crucial moment for our movement. We're tracking behind our fundraising goals and Elizabeth is counting on grassroots donors to make up the difference. Your contribution would have a major impact on the future of this campaign and our organizing operation. That's why we want to thank everyone who chips in today with a FREE sticker. name: Sara Gideon for Senate
subject: These guys
body:
You need to see this:
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e13/4bef7a87/6a086a8a/287f952d/259609039/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
I want to give you a quick sense of what we're up against in this race.
First, Susan Collins voted to confirm this guy:
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e13/4bef7a87/6a086a8a/287f952c/259609039/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjgtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191228-2-full")
Shortly after, this guy said that "Susan Collins will be well funded, I can assure you."
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e13/4bef7a87/6a086a8a/287f952c/259609039/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjgtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191228-2-full")
Then this guy -- often described as Trump's "judge whisperer" -- held a high-dollar fundraiser for Susan Collins in his $4 million home.
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e13/4bef7a87/6a086a8a/287f952c/259609039/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjgtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191228-2-full")
**That 's why Sara Gideon needs YOUR help to fight back -- especially before this FEC fundraising deadline.**
**[Can Sara Gideon count on you to make a $3 contribution to our campaign before this critical FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close?](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e13/4bef7a87/6a086a8a/287f952c/259609039/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjgtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191228-2-full")**
With your help, we are going to beat all of those guys and elect this champion to the Senate.
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e13/4bef7a87/6a086a8a/287f952c/259609039/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjgtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191228-2-full")
But she cannot do it alone. So we are asking:
**[Can you make a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon for Senate before our final FEC fundraising deadline of the year comes to a close?](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e13/4bef7a87/6a086a8a/287f952c/259609039/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjgtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191228-2-full")**
Thank you,
Team Sara
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e13/4bef7a87/6a086a8a/287f952c/259609039/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjgtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191228-2-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e13/4bef7a87/6a086a8a/287f9523/259609039/VEsP/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e13/4bef7a87/6a086a8a/287f9522/259609039/VEsHBQ/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e13/4bef7a87/6a086a8a/287f9521/259609039/VEsHBA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**
